name: @0xhoneyjar/loa-hounfour-stub
description: RC-staging stub for @0xhoneyjar/loa-hounfour. Re-exports the v8.6.0 cycle-005 schema cluster + 4 FR-C constraint builtins from the main package's source. Consumers alias `"@0xhoneyjar/loa-hounfour": "file:./tools/hounfour-stub"` during RC to lock against the staged surface; after GA they switch the alias to the published version. NA-2 fix per cycle-005 PRD: `private: true` makes `npm publish` fail with EPRIVATE so the stub is unpublishable; schema $id strings retain the production short-form (PascalCase) so consumers see no surface drift between stub and post-publish.
